apt_metadata.depends: python3-bottle, python3-cryptography, python3-dbus, python3-matplotlib, python3-mysqldb, python3-openssl, python3-pil, python3-psycopg2, python3-pymongo, python3-sqlalchemy, python3-tinydb, libjs-sphinxdoc, python3:any
apt_metadata.description:
network recon framework IVRE or DRUNK
This package contains IVRE (Instrument de veille sur les réseaux extérieurs) or
DRUNK (Dynamic Recon of UNKnown networks), a network recon framework,
including tools for passive recon (flow analytics relying on Bro, Argus,
Nfdump, fingerprint analytics based on Bro and p0f and active recon.
.
IVRE uses Nmap to run scans, can use ZMap as a pre-scanner; IVRE can also
import XML output from Nmap and Masscan.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ivre because ### ivre.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `ivre [COMMAND]` as documented upstream for ivre.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ivre with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ivre --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### ivre.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install ivre
Install with: sudo apt install ivre
